goal: Reduce size and complexity of data-related states by extracting their handling logic to a dedicated facade class and delegating from the enum constants.

ops.details: Create a new class org.jsoup.parser.TokeniserStateDataFacade with static methods that encapsulate the logic currently implemented inside the following TokeniserState enum constants: Data, CharacterReferenceInData, Rcdata, CharacterReferenceInRcdata, Rawtext, PLAINTEXT. Each facade method will have the signature: static void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r, TokeniserState state) or a named variant (e.g., readData, readCharRefInData, readRcdata, readCharRefInRcdata, readRawtext, readPlaintext). The methods will reuse Tokeniser and CharacterReader and will call TokeniserStateHelper as needed. The facade lives in the same package org.jsoup.parser.

Modify the read(...) implementations of the enum constants Data, CharacterReferenceInData, Rcdata, CharacterReferenceInRcdata, Rawtext, and PLAINTEXT to delegate to the corresponding TokeniserStateDataFacade static method (e.g., TokeniserStateDataFacade.readData(t, r); ). Keep enum constant names and transitions (references to other TokeniserState constants) unchanged; delegation centralizes complex switch logic into the facade.
